parameters.blocksUi:
={{ [{"type": "header", "text": {"type": "plain_text", "text": "🚨 High Urgency Lead"}}, {"type": "section", "fields": [{"type": "mrkdwn", "text": "*Name:*
" + $("Validate & Enrich Lead").item.json.name}, {"type": "mrkdwn", "text": "*Email:*
" + $("Validate & Enrich Lead").item.json.email}, {"type": "mrkdwn", "text": "*Company:*
" + ($("Validate & Enrich Lead").item.json.company || "N/A")}, {"type": "mrkdwn", "text": "*Product:*
" + $("Validate & Enrich Lead").item.json.product}]}, {"type": "section", "text": {"type": "mrkdwn", "text": "*Message:*
" + $("Validate & Enrich Lead").item.json.message}}] }}

parameters.summary: ={{ "High Urgency Lead: " + $("Validate & Enrich Lead").item.json.name + " - " + $("Validate & Enrich Lead").item.json.product }}

additionalFields.description:
={{ "Lead Details:

Name: " + $("Validate & Enrich Lead").item.json.name + "
Email: " + $("Validate & Enrich Lead").item.json.email + "
Company: " + ($("Validate & Enrich Lead").item.json.company || "N/A") + "
Product: " + $("Validate & Enrich Lead").item.json.product + "

Message:
" + $("Validate & Enrich Lead").item.json.message }}

parameters.responseBody: ={{ { "status": "success", "message": "Lead received and processed", "id": $("Validate & Enrich Lead").item.json.id, "urgency": $("Validate & Enrich Lead").item.json.urgency } }}

parameters.subject: ={{ "Thank you for contacting us, " + $("Validate & Enrich Lead").item.json.name }}
parameters.message:
={{ "

Dear " + $("Validate & Enrich Lead").item.json.name + ",

Thank you for your interest in our " + $("Validate & Enrich Lead").item.json.product + ". We have received your message and will get back to you shortly.

Best regards,
Support Team

" }}

parameters.blocksUi:
={{ [{"type": "header", "text": {"type": "plain_text", "text": "📊 Daily Lead Digest - " + $json.date}}, {"type": "section", "text": {"type": "mrkdwn", "text": "*Total Leads:* " + $json.totalLeads}}, {"type": "section", "fields": [{"type": "mrkdwn", "text": "*High Urgency:* " + $json.urgencyCounts.high}, {"type": "mrkdwn", "text": "*Normal:* " + $json.urgencyCounts.normal}]}, {"type": "section", "text": {"type": "mrkdwn", "text": "*By Product:*
" + Object.entries($json.productCounts).map(([k, v]) => "• " + k + ": " + v).join("
")}}, {"type": "section", "text": {"type": "mrkdwn", "text": "*Top 5 Recent Leads:*
" + $json.topRecentLeads.map((l, i) => (i+1) + ". " + l.name + " (" + l.email + ") - " + l.product + " [" + l.urgency + "]").join("
")}}] }}
